results.steps: Open the exam venue administration page in the browser.
results.expected: Venue management page loads without critical console or network errors.

results.precondition: Venue scope exists for the CSE department.
results.steps: Create campus, building, and room. Edit the room capacity and maintenance fields.
results.expected: Room workflow supports create and edit operations in department scope.
results.actual: Campus, building, and room created; room capacity updated to 110.

results.steps: Create an exam academic calendar and a campus holiday.
results.expected: Calendar and holiday records are created in department scope.
results.actual: Calendar page rendered with the new calendar workflow present.

results.precondition: Scheduling session exists in DRAFT state.
results.steps: Attempt invalid DRAFT -> PUBLISHED transition, then transition DRAFT -> SCHEDULED and generate timetable.
results.expected: Invalid transition is rejected, capacity shortage is rejected, and generation succeeds with schedule evidence.

results.precondition: A generated schedule item exists with enrolled students.
results.steps: Generate the seat plan and verify uniqueness and room-capacity alignment.
results.expected: Seat plan generation produces one unique seat per student without exceeding capacity.

results.precondition: Schedule item exists with a seat plan.
results.steps: Assign a primary invigilator and a replacement teacher for the same duty.
results.expected: Invigilator assignment persists with replacement history on the duty record.

results.precondition: Scheduling session is published and admit cards have been issued.
results.steps: Student lists and downloads their own admit card PDF. Foreign student attempts access. Admin regenerates the card.
results.expected: Own admit-card PDF downloads, foreign access is denied, and admin regeneration is audited.

results.precondition: Published seat plan and admit-card artifacts exist.
results.steps: Verify the student QR token, reject an invalid token, record attendance, and then correct the attendance with a reason.
results.expected: QR verification succeeds, invalid token is denied, attendance is idempotent, and corrections require audit context.

results.precondition: Invigilator has incident permissions for the running hall.
results.steps: Create, acknowledge, and resolve an incident for the scheduled exam item.
results.expected: Incident workflow persists and transitions are recorded without duplicate acknowledgement side effects.

results.precondition: Phase 8 reporting data exists for the generated session.
results.steps: Generate a CSV room-utilization export and a PDF attendance export.
results.expected: CSV and PDF exports download successfully with server-side access control.

results.precondition: Department-scoped Phase 8 data exists for CSE.
results.steps: Department Admin B requests CSE scheduling sessions directly. Anonymous user requests admin reports.
results.expected: Cross-department list leakage is blocked and unauthenticated report access is denied.

results.precondition: Phase 6 Redis runtime is active and the Phase 8 schedule item is RUNNING.
results.steps: Teacher joins live exam monitoring, student starts the linked exam attempt, then teacher opens the Phase 8 invigilation dashboard.
results.expected: Phase 6 live monitoring works for the linked exam and the Phase 8 dashboard shows the running invigilation item.
